coreJobStatement: Receive, store, and dispatch client goods with full inventory integrity — from inbound receiving through storage and pick-and-pack to outbound dispatch and carrier hand-off.

l6Systems.name: Inbound Receiving
l6Systems.jobFamily: Receive, verify, and register arriving shipments into inventory

l6Systems.name: Put-Away & Slotting
l6Systems.jobFamily: Move verified goods to designated storage locations

l6Systems.name: Storage & Inventory Control
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain goods in condition-appropriate zones; preserve inventory accuracy

l6Systems.name: Order Picking & Consolidation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Retrieve and consolidate SKUs per outbound orders

l6Systems.name: Packing, Labeling & Staging
l6Systems.jobFamily: Pack shipments to carrier spec, apply labels, stage at outbound dock

l6Systems.name: Outbound Dispatch
l6Systems.jobFamily: Load vehicles, confirm shipment, hand off to carrier

l6Systems.name: Facility Safety & Security (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain fire safety, emergency exit compliance, physical access control, and surveillance across all warehouse zones and dock areas

l6Systems.name: Inventory & WMS Operations (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide real-time inventory tracking, location management, task direction, and labor management supporting every core process step

l6Systems.name: Maintenance & Equipment Reliability (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain material handling equipment, racking, dock equipment, and building infrastructure to prevent downtime and safety incidents

vnUnits.name: Dock Leveler & Loading Dock Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Bridge the height gap between truck bed and dock floor to enable safe and efficient loading and unloading of goods

alternatives.name: Mechanical dock levelers (Assa Abloy Loading Systems, Serco) / Hydraulic dock levelers (Kelley, McGuire, Pentalift) / Air-bag levelers (Assa Abloy, Niverplast)

vnUnits.name: Inbound Scanning & Labeling Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Scan, verify, and label arriving goods to create inventory records and confirm shipment accuracy against purchase orders

alternatives.name: Mobile handheld scanner (Zebra, Honeywell) / Fixed RFID portal scanner (Zebra Impinj, Alien Technology) / Combined handheld+RFID (Zebra FX7500)

vnUnits.name: Industrial Forklift Fleet
vnUnits.functionalJob: Transport palletized goods from receiving docks to designated storage locations and between warehouse zones

alternatives.name: Electric counterbalance/reach truck (Toyota, Crown, Jungheinrich, Kion) / IC counterbalance (Toyota, Hyster-Yale, Mitsubishi) / Automated guided vehicle — AGV (Dematic, Swisslog, Linde)
alternatives.source: Grand View Research 2025 — electric forklifts ~58% total [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Induct Conveyor System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Move goods mechanically from receiving to put-away zones, reducing manual handling and increasing throughput for case and carton flows

alternatives.name: No conveyor — manual pallet jack routing / Roller/belt conveyor (Hytrol, Dematic, Intralox) / Tow/tugger conveyor (Jervis B. Webb)

vnUnits.name: Pallet Storage System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Provide structured vertical racking to store palletized goods at defined locations, maximizing storage density while enabling forklift access

alternatives.name: Selective pallet rack (Mecalux, SSI Schäfer, Constructor, AR Racking) / Drive-in or push-back rack (Mecalux, Dematic) / Wide-aisle floor stacking (no rack)

vnUnits.name: Automated Storage & Retrieval System (AS/RS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Automatically store and retrieve goods using crane, shuttle, or robotic systems to increase throughput and storage density with minimal manual labor

alternatives.name: Unit-load AS/RS crane (Dematic, SSI Schäfer, Daifuku) / Shuttle-based (Kardex, Dematic) / Goods-to-person cube storage (AutoStore, Geek+, Symbotic)
alternatives.source: Precedence Research 2025 — Daifuku, SSI Schäfer, Dematic, Symbotic, AutoStore combined >55% share [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Order Picking Technology
vnUnits.functionalJob: Guide warehouse operators or autonomous robots to retrieve correct SKUs from storage locations and consolidate them into outbound orders

alternatives.name: Paper/RF-directed manual picking (legacy) / Guided picking (pick-to-light, voice picking — SSI Schäfer, Knapp, Honeywell Vocollect, Lucas Systems) / Autonomous mobile robot (Locus Robotics, 6RS/Ocado, Geek+, Fetch/Zebra)
alternatives.source: Analyst estimates; AMR share growing rapidly 2023–2025

vnUnits.name: Packing & Labeling Workstation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Pack picked goods into shipping containers, apply void fill, seal cartons, and print and affix carrier-compliant shipping labels

alternatives.name: Manual packing bench + label printer (Zebra ZT series) / Semi-automated void fill + sealer (Sealed Air, FP International) / Fully automated packing machine (Neopost, Quadient, Sparck Technologies)

vnUnits.name: Transport Management System (TMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Plan, execute, and track outbound shipments including carrier selection, bill of lading generation, and delivery confirmation

alternatives.name: ERP-integrated TMS (SAP TM, Oracle TM) / Best-of-breed TMS (MercuryGate, Transplace/Uber Freight, Descartes) / Carrier-provided portal (no dedicated TMS)

vnUnits.name: Fire Detection & Alarm System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Detect smoke, heat, or fire conditions across warehouse zones and trigger alarm notification to occupants and emergency services

alternatives.name: Johnson Controls (Simplex/Tyco) / Siemens (Cerberus) / Honeywell (Notifier)
alternatives.source: Johnson Controls, Siemens, Honeywell collectively >62% fire alarm market [WEB — IntelMarketResearch 2025]

vnUnits.name: Emergency Exit Security Device
vnUnits.functionalJob: Prevent unauthorized propping or misuse of emergency exit doors while maintaining fire evacuation compliance and reporting door events to centralized monitoring

alternatives.name: Wired alarmed exit bars (Von Duprin/Allegion, Corbin Russwin) / Mechanical door-handle alarm guards (GfS Exit Control, ABUS) / Wireless electronic exit control (dormakaba SafeRoute, GEZE SecuLogic) / Integrated delayed egress (Allegion, dormakaba)
alternatives.source: No published warehouse-specific split; estimated from install base patterns [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Perimeter Access Control System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Control and log physical access at dock doors, personnel entrances, and zone boundaries through credential-based authorization

alternatives.name: Wired enterprise ACS (Lenel-S2, Software House, Honeywell Pro-Watch) / Cloud ACS (Brivo, Genetec, Verkada) / Wireless RF ACS (ASSA ABLOY Aperio, dormakaba MATRIX)
alternatives.source: MarketsandMarkets 2025 — ASSA ABLOY, dormakaba, Johnson Controls, Allegion, Honeywell hold ~70–80% ACS market [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Video Surveillance System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Monitor and record activity across dock areas, aisles, and perimeter zones to deter theft, verify incidents, and support insurance and audit requirements

alternatives.name: IP network cameras (Axis, Hanwha, Avigilon) / AI-analytics camera platforms (Verkada, Arlo, Milestone) / Legacy analog CCTV (Hikvision, Dahua, Bosch)
alternatives.source: Analyst estimates — IP share growing year on year

vnUnits.name: Building Management System (BMS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Centrally monitor and control HVAC, lighting, fire, and security systems to maintain safe operating conditions and energy efficiency across the facility

alternatives.name: Siemens (Desigo CC) / Honeywell (EBI, Forge) / Schneider Electric (EcoStruxure)
alternatives.source: Commercial security market data [WEB — Precedence Research 2025]

vnUnits.name: Warehouse Management System Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Provide real-time inventory tracking, location management, task direction, and labor optimization across all warehouse operations

alternatives.name: SAP Extended Warehouse Management (SAP EWM) / Manhattan Active WMS / Blue Yonder WMS / Oracle WMS Cloud
alternatives.source: MarketsandMarkets 2025 — top 5 players (Oracle, Blue Yonder, SAP, Manhattan, Tecsys) ~33% combined; global WMS market $4.57B in 2025 [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Forklift Fleet Telematics
vnUnits.functionalJob: Track forklift utilization, operator behavior, shock events, and maintenance intervals to optimize fleet performance and ensure safety compliance

alternatives.name: OEM telematics (Toyota I_Site, Crown InfoLink, Jungheinrich ISM Online) / Third-party fleet mgmt (Hyster Tracker, Linde Connect) / Manual logbook

vnUnits.name: Racking Inspection System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Inspect pallet racking for structural damage, overloading, and compliance with ANSI MH16.1 safety standards to prevent collapse incidents

alternatives.name: Periodic manual inspection (ANSI MH16.1 schedule) / Digital audit software (RackEye, IntelliRack) / Load monitoring sensors

marquardtPosition: L5 Emergency Exit Security Device under L6h1 Facility Safety & Security — GfS Türwächter IoT (Exit Control 179/1125) enters as mechanical door-handle alarm guard with IoT monitoring for warehouse emergency exits
